creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 178221
Updated shar

There were various problems with the old shar file. It pulls in PHP 5.6, uses outdated statements, etc.
Also i changed the name to match better with existing PHP 7.0 PECL ports.

I reworked it for a better shape, but failed to get in run. It fails with:
===>  Building for pecl-apcu_bc-1.0.3
make[1]: cannot open Makefile.

Since i'm heading into vacation right now, i attached the current draft. Please pick it up and finish it :)
